design_philosophy: Cyberpunk aesthetic with high contrast, neon accents, and deep void blacks. Tension created by sharp edges and asymmetrical grids. Utilitarian 'terminal' feel for the dashboard, cinematic depth for the portfolio.

typography.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl font-black tracking-tighter uppercase
typography.h2: text-2xl sm:text-3xl lg:text-4xl font-bold tracking-tight uppercase
typography.label: text-xs font-mono tracking-[0.2em] uppercase text-secondary

spacing_and_layout.alignment: optical alignment, heavy use of left-aligned text to mimic terminal interfaces

surfaces_and_effects.button_primary: bg-primary text-white font-mono uppercase tracking-wider px-8 py-4 hover:bg-primary/90 hover:shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(255,42,109,0.5)] transition-all
surfaces_and_effects.button_secondary: bg-transparent border border-secondary text-secondary font-mono uppercase tracking-wider px-8 py-4 hover:bg-secondary/10 hover:shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(5,217,232,0.3)] transition-all

components.navigation: Sticky top-0 z-50 glassmorphism, mono-font links, primary CTA. Links visible on desktop.
components.hero: Full height (min-h-[90vh]), background image with bg-black/70 overlay or gradient overlay to ensure text contrast. Large H1, terminal typing effect for subtitle.
components.bento_projects: Asymmetrical grid. Main project col-span-12 md:col-span-8 row-span-2. Secondary projects col-span-12 md:col-span-4.
components.resume_section: Two-column layout. Left: sticky index/skills. Right: Timeline of experience with left-border accent (cyan).
components.contact_form: Shadcn UI forms customized with sharp edges, dark inputs, neon focus rings.
components.dashboard: Strict grid hierarchy, dense spacing, sidebar navigation. Use Shadcn Table and Dialog for content management.

motion.hover: High contrast shifts, neon glowing shadows.
motion.entrance: Framer Motion: subtle glitch effect on load, or staggered fade-up.

hero_bg.description: Vibrant neon-lit streets of Tokyo at night
hero_bg.usage: Hero section background with dark overlay

about_image.description: Sleek gaming setup featuring neon lights

project_1.description: Cybernetic prosthetic arm with chrome detailing under vibrant neon lights

project_2.description: Detailed macro shot of a black game controller

dashboard_bg.description: Dynamic long exposure capturing vibrant neon light streaks
dashboard_bg.usage: Subtle background texture for the login/dashboard wrapper

accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure all text over neon accents meets APCA 3:1 contrast. Use dark text (#050505) over Cyan and Green accents.
accessibility_and_testing.testing: All interactive elements MUST include data-testid attribute in kebab-case (e.g., data-testid='hero-cta-button').

instructions_to_main_agent: Use Unbounded (Headings), Outfit (Body), and JetBrains Mono (Accents) via Google Fonts.
Configure Tailwind CSS to use the specific hex colors provided in the palette, extending colors and creating custom drop-shadows for glowing effects.
Build custom layout for Marketing pages (Home, Projects, Resume, Contact) using raw HTML/Tailwind with Framer Motion.
Build the dashboard (accessible via a hidden or specific /admin route) using Shadcn UI components heavily customized to fit the neon dark mode theme.
Implement the bento grid for the Projects section.
Include a 'Download PDF' button on the Resume page.
Use data-testid attributes on all interactive elements as requested.
